_comment: Optional. Manual readings from intheweights.com, keyed by the same entity name as config.json. The site is Turnstile-protected, so do not automate it; check it by hand and record the reading here. The report then shows both signals side by side and flags any confabulation surface (high strength here, near-zero real recognition in the panel).

Ada Lovelace.description: Recognized as the nineteenth-century mathematician and first programmer.
